summary: Enhanced Scan Station testing complete - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend: 15/15 tests passed for transaction types (earn/spend/bonus/adjustment), categories, and notes. Frontend: All 4 type buttons visible, category grids change correctly per type, notes input with correct placeholder, full transaction flow works with balance updates.
passed_tests: POST /api/transactions/quick with category=Job&notes=Test creates transaction with those values
POST /api/transactions/quick with type=spend deducts from balance (amount becomes negative)
POST /api/transactions/quick with type=bonus adds to balance
POST /api/transactions/quick with type=adjustment can be positive or negative
GET /api/transactions shows category and notes in results
All earn categories work: Job, Task, Attendance, Homework, Helping Out, Other
All spend categories work: Store Purchase, Event, Food, Activity, Other
All bonus categories work: Award, Achievement, Staff Pick, Birthday, Contest, Other
All adjustment categories work: Correction, Penalty, Transfer, Admin Fix, Other
Transaction without category uses 'Quick Transaction' as default
Transaction with empty notes stores empty string
Member 'earned' field updates on earn transactions
Member 'spent' field updates on spend transactions
Member 'bonus' field updates on bonus transactions
Member 'adjustments' field updates on adjustment transactions
Frontend: Scanner page shows 4 type buttons (Earn, Spend, Bonus, Adjust)
Frontend: Selecting 'Earn' shows categories: Job, Task, Attendance, Homework, Helping Out, Other
Frontend: Selecting 'Spend' shows categories: Store Purchase, Event, Food, Activity, Other
Frontend: Selecting 'Bonus' shows categories: Award, Achievement, Staff Pick, Birthday, Contest, Other
Frontend: Selecting 'Adjust' shows categories: Correction, Penalty, Transfer, Admin Fix, Other
Frontend: Notes input field visible with placeholder 'Leave a note (optional)'
Frontend: Full transaction flow - select member, pick type, pick category, enter amount, add note, submit
Frontend: Balance updates correctly after transaction (116 -> 121 after +5 earn)
Frontend: Success toast shows 'Added 5 bucks!' after transaction
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is clean and follows existing patterns
transactionsApi.quick properly passes category and notes as query params
Backend correctly handles default category ('Quick Transaction') when not provided
Category grid dynamically changes based on selected transaction type
Button colors match transaction type semantics (green=earn, red=spend, amber=bonus, blue=adjust)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test transactions for Mem-05152 (Reese Hoban) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Scan Station fully working. 4 transaction types with dynamic category grids. Notes field with 'Leave a note (optional)' placeholder. Member Reese Hoban (Mem-05152) balance is now 121 after test transactions.

transaction_types.spend: Deducts from balance (amount stored as negative), updates 'spent' field
transaction_types.adjustment: Can be positive or negative, updates 'adjustments' field
